tools.name: Modal
tools.description: Run serverless Python code on GPU hardware. Define functions with decorators, Modal handles the infrastructure, cold starts, and scaling.
tools.discovery_context: Needed persistent GPU access for batch LLM inference without managing a server
tools.Supports: any Python package, CUDA, multi-GPU, batch inference
tools.Best for: batch processing, async LLM pipelines, data processing
tools.notes:
## Overview

Modal is infrastructure-as-code for Python. Write Python functions, decorate them with `@app.function()`, and Modal handles everything else: GPU allocation, container management, cold sta

tools.name: Firecrawl
tools.description: Turn entire websites into clean markdown or structured data. Handles JavaScript-rendered pages, rate limits, and anti-scraping automatically.
tools.discovery_context: Needed to extract content from a JavaScript-heavy SPA for RAG pipeline
tools.Best for: RAG data pipelines, competitor research, content aggregation.
tools.notes:
## Overview

Firecrawl is a web scraping API that handles the hard parts: JavaScript rendering, rate limiting, proxy rotation, and extracting clean content. Give it a URL or sitemap, get back clean ma

tools.name: Aider
tools.description: Terminal-based AI coding assistant. Edit code directly in your local repo with git diff awareness. Works with any LLM that supports function calling.
tools.discovery_context: Looking for a CLI-based coding agent that works with local git repos
tools.Best for: terminal-first workflows, solo developers, fast edits.
tools.notes:
## Overview

Aider is a CLI coding assistant that edits code directly in your repo. It understands git diffs, so it knows what changed and why. Connect it to Claude, GPT-4o, or any OpenAI-compatible e

apis.name: Tavily AI
apis.description: Search API specifically designed for AI agents. Returns clean, relevant results without the SEO noise that clogs up AI responses.
apis.discovery_context: Building RAG pipeline and needed clean web search results
apis.Best for: AI agent web research, RAG pipelines, fact checking.
apis.notes:
## Overview

Tavily is a search API built specifically for AI applications. Unlike Google or Bing, it returns structured, relevant results optimized for AI consumption — no ads, no SEO content, no ran

apis.name: Jina AI
apis.description: Reader API turns any URL into clean LLM-friendly text. Also provides top-tier embeddings and a Reranker API.
apis.discovery_context: Needed to extract article text from news sites for a summarization pipeline
apis.notes:
## Overview

Jina AI provides two essential APIs for AI developers: a Reader that extracts clean text from any URL, and embedding models that compete with OpenAI at a fraction of the cost.

models.name: Groq
models.description: Fastest LLM inference API available. Sub-second first-token latency for Llama 3, Mixtral, and Gemma models on custom LPU hardware.
models.discovery_context: Building a real-time chat app and needed latency lower than OpenAI or Anthropic
models.notes:
## Overview

Groq's LPU (Language Processing Unit) delivers the fastest LLM inference in the industry. First-token latency under 1 second for 70B models. Great for real-time applications where speed m

models.name: Gemini 2.5 Pro
models.description: Google's flagship multimodal model. Massive context window, native tool use, and strong performance on coding, reasoning, and video understanding.
models.discovery_context: Comparing multimodal models for a video understanding pipeline
models.Best for: long documents, video understanding, native tool use.
models.notes:
## Overview

Gemini 2.5 Pro is Google's most capable multimodal model. It handles text, images, audio, and video in a single context window. Its 1M token context and native tool use make it ideal for

models.name: OpenRouter
models.description: Unified API gateway for 100+ LLM models from Anthropic, OpenAI, Meta, Mistral, and dozens of others. Single API key, single endpoint.
models.discovery_context: Looking for a way to compare multiple LLM responses without managing multiple API keys
models.Use case: fast model comparison, cost arbitrage across providers.
models.notes:
## Overview

OpenRouter is an API aggregator that provides unified access to 100+ models from different providers through a single OpenAI-compatible API. You pay per token at each provider's rates + a

models.name: Replicate
models.description: Run open-source models (Llama, Stable Diffusion, Whisper, etc.) via API. No GPU setup required. Pay per second of inference.
models.discovery_context: Need to run a Stable Diffusion variant without managing GPU infrastructure
models.Best for: trying open-source models fast, prototyping without infra.
models.Models: llama-3-70b, llama-3-8b, sd-xl, sdxl-turbo, whisper-large-v3, cosxl.
models.notes:
## Overview

Replicate lets you run open-source machine learning models through a simple API. No GPU setup, no Docker, no infra management. Pick a model, send inputs, get outputs.
